title: MWS Ethics of Research Committee Rules of Procedure
author: Max Weber Stiftung - Deutsche Geisteswissenschaftliche Institute im Ausland
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These rules of procedure describe the duties, the composition and the method of work of the Ethics of Research Committee in the Max Weber Foundation (MWS).
